You're running an unsigned public beta of The Civic Desk. Windows SmartScreen may warn on install; that's expected. Report issues on GitHub.

Drafting Article

Lead: City Council to vote on roof contract for library: A city council meeting agenda includes a vote on a contract for roof work at the public library. This impacts local government spending and construction timelines. Editor context: This is an upcoming council decision with potential city spending implications. Suggested treatment: story. Newsworthiness: 12/20 (immediacy 4, impact 3, conflict 2, novelty 3). Why now: A council vote is scheduled this week regarding a public facility project. Suggested next step: Review the agenda packet for details on the contract amount, vendor information, and any community input processes before drafting. What would make this publishable: The full agenda packet with details on the contract, vendor information, and any community input processes.
